items.title: Q3 Earnings Season Kicks Off: Major Banks Thrive While Regional Lenders Signal Trouble
items.description: Better-than-expected results from big banks lift S&P 500 EPS growth for Q3 2025 to 8.5%.

items.title: Goldman Sachs (GS): Assessing Valuation After Surging Investment Banking Profits and Earnings Beat
items.description: Goldman Sachs Group (GS) posted quarterly results that caught attention, with profits jumping as investment banking fees rose 42% from last year. This earnings beat highlights strong momentum in the bank’s core operations. See our latest analysis for Goldman Sachs Group. Momentum is building for Goldman Sachs, with the stock’s year-to-date share price return at 32.8% and a one-year total shareholder return of 50.3%. Standout earnings and aggressive moves in investment banking are powering...
